text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O gets injured during training, so
I quickly bring her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry for causing you all this trouble. I feel
a lot better now that I've been treated.
choice_data_list: For now, you need to rest up and recover.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Um... Are you sure it's okay for me to rest?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
When my dad was a sumo wrestler, he kept on
training even when he was injured. Slowly and
carefully, of course.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I believe it's important to work hard day after
day. That's what gives you the strength to
withstand any adversity.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So, please! I want to continue with my training! I
won't push myself too hard, and I'll make sure to
go slowly!
choice_data_list: It's too dangerous with that injury.
Okay. Let's see what you can do.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry. I wasn't thinking clearly. You're right. I
could make my injury worse if I'm not careful.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll go rest so I can heal properly and get back to
training as soon as possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O looks crestfallen as she returns
to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Thank you so much! Let's go straight to the
gym!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Owww! It hurts just to walk...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I suppose this means I can't just prioritize my
feelings—I need to think about my body as well...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If this injury worsens, all my hard work will have
been for nothing... I think I'll rest for today,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O looks frustrated as she slowly
returns to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'll make sure I don't overdo it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I just tried some stretches, and it went much
better than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Next, I'd like to try some exercises that don't put
any strain on my injury.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O stays mindful of her injury and
only does what she's capable of during training.
